scripts.lint: npm run lint:front && npm run lint:back && npm run lint:be
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:front && npm run typecheck:back && npm run typecheck:be
scripts.test: npm run test:front && npm run test:back && npm run test:be
scripts.build: npm run build:front && npm run build:back && npm run build:be
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm run quality && npm run test && npm run build
